seoTitle: Crangan Bay vs Craven — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Crangan Bay vs Craven: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Crangan Bay and Craven.
heading: Crangan Bay vs Craven — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Crangan Bay, New South Wales and Craven, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Craven has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Crangan Bay (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Crangan Bay or Craven safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Crangan Bay has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Craven scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Crangan Bay scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Craven scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Crangan Bay or Craven?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Craven has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
